reasoning: Both audits failed at source download stage, preventing review of critical files. PKGBUILD appears safe but fonts/scripts couldn't be verified.
coverage_issues: Source files (fonts/SVN content) not reviewed due to download failure
Potential install hooks or malicious fonts unchecked
false_negatives: Risks in font binaries (malicious glyphs) or SVN repository content missed
Undetected post-install scripts if present in source
learnings: Improve download robustness: retry mechanisms, better error handling for VCS sources
Prioritize actual executables (fonts/binaries) over metadata when available
Add fallback manual source inspection when automated download fails
